---
title: "Tyler Celotta"
subtitle: "Physics · Engineering · Photography"
image: profile.gif
image-alt: "Photo of Tyler"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tylercelotta@reed.edu
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/TyGuy-5
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tyler-celotta/
---

Physics student at Reed College in a 3/2 dual degree program (BA Physics → BS Mechanical Engineering at Columbia). I build things with my hands, model things with code, photograph people, and spend too much time outdoors — from the shop floor to the backcountry.

<div class="tc-section">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">What I Do</span>
<div class="tc-section-title">Built for every kind of curious mind</div>
<hr class="tc-rule">

<div class="tc-audience-grid">
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">⚙️</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">For Professionals</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Engineer in Training</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Physics + ME dual degree, machining and fabrication, data analysis, and real-world internship experience. See my resume, projects, and certifications.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">🔬</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">For Collaborators</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Technical Problem Solver</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Python, R, CAD/CAM, CNC programming, and experimental design. I work best on messy, real-world problems that need both rigor and hands-on intuition.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">📷</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">For Creatives</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Portrait Photographer</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Capturing natural light and authentic moments in portrait sessions since 2023. Operated under Celotta Photos with a documentary-influenced eye.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">🌲</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">For Peers</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Maker, Scout & Writer</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Eagle Scout, outdoor enthusiast, and community builder. The blog tracks personal projects, adventures, and the occasional deep dive into something interesting.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="tc-stats-strip">
  <div>
    <div class="tc-stat-number">3/2</div>
    <div class="tc-stat-label">Dual Degree<br>Program</div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="tc-stat-number">±0.003″</div>
    <div class="tc-stat-label">Tolerance<br>Achieved</div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="tc-stat-number">5+</div>
    <div class="tc-stat-label">Years of<br>Leadership</div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="tc-stat-number">OSHA 10</div>
    <div class="tc-stat-label">Safety<br>Certified</div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="tc-stat-number">Eagle</div>
    <div class="tc-stat-label">BSA Highest<br>Rank</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tc-section">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">Experience</span>
<div class="tc-section-title">Where I've been</div>
<hr class="tc-rule">

<div class="tc-timeline">
  <div class="tc-timeline-item">
    <div class="tc-tl-date">Jun 2025 – Aug 2025</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-role">Mechanical Engineering Intern</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-org">Twin Cities Makers · Minneapolis, MN</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-desc">Designed a 15-hour machining curriculum; built a two-stage evaporative cooling prototype (ΔT = 5°F at 60% RH); fabricated precision tooling to ±0.003″ tolerance.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-timeline-item">
    <div class="tc-tl-date">Jan 2024 – Present</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-role">BA Physics Student</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-org">Reed College · Portland, OR</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-desc">3/2 Dual Degree program toward BS Mechanical Engineering at Columbia. Coursework spanning calculus, linear algebra, data science, physics, and the Reed Humanities core.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-timeline-item">
    <div class="tc-tl-date">Oct 2023</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-role">Engineering Job Shadow</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-org">Medtronic · Minneapolis, MN</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-desc">Shadowed six biomedical engineers on pacemaker systems R&amp;D; observed live surgery; discussed materials and testing protocols under NDA.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-timeline-item">
    <div class="tc-tl-date">Nov 2021 – Mar 2022</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-role">Grant Writer</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-org">Centennial School District · Lino Lakes, MN</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-desc">Co-drafted a diesel-to-electric bus fleet conversion proposal; 30-year cost-benefit analysis with state data and Excel financial modeling.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-timeline-item">
    <div class="tc-tl-date">2023</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-role">Eagle Scout</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-org">Boy Scouts of America</div>
    <div class="tc-tl-desc">Scouting's highest rank — years of leadership, community service, and outdoor skills culminating in a capstone Eagle Scout service project.</div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="tc-section">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">Toolkit</span>
<div class="tc-section-title">Skills & Tools</div>
<hr class="tc-rule">

<div class="tc-skill-block">
  <div class="tc-skill-label">Programming & Data</div>
  <div class="tc-tags">
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">Python</span>
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">R</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Excel</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Minitab</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Data Analysis</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Math Modeling</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Graphical Analysis</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tc-skill-block">
  <div class="tc-skill-label">Fabrication & Design</div>
  <div class="tc-tags">
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">Fusion 360 (CAD/CAM)</span>
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">CNC Milling (2.5 & 3-axis)</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Manual Milling</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">MIG / TIG / Stick Welding</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Equipment Calibration</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Small Engine Repair</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Machine Maintenance</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tc-skill-block">
  <div class="tc-skill-label">Certifications</div>
  <div class="tc-tags">
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">OSHA 10</span>
    <span class="tc-tag tc-tag-hi">WFR (Wilderness First Responder)</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">First Aid / CPR</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Epinephrine (2025)</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Lifeguard (2022)</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tc-skill-block">
  <div class="tc-skill-label">Languages</div>
  <div class="tc-tags">
    <span class="tc-tag">English (native)</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">Quarto / R Markdown</span>
    <span class="tc-tag">G-code (CNC)</span>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="padding: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;">
  <a href="Portfolio.qmd" class="tc-cta-link tc-cta-filled">View Portfolio →</a>
  <a href="Photography.qmd" class="tc-cta-link">Photography</a>
  <a href="Blog.qmd" class="tc-cta-link">Blog</a>
</div>
